mapper.select: select a.*,b.employee_name,b.job_number,b.post,c.name as deptName from hrm_attendance_clock a left join hrm_employee b on a.clock_employee_id = b.employee_id left join hrm_dept c on b.dept_id = c.dept_id where b.is_del = 0 and a.clock_employee_id = #{employeeId} order by a.clock_time desc

select count(clock_id) from hrm_attendance_clock t1 inner join ( select max(clock_id) id from hrm_attendance_clock where date_format(attendance_time,'%Y-%m-%d') between #{times[0]} and #{times[1]} and clock_employee_id=#{employeeId} and clock_status=4 group by date_format(attendance_time,'%Y-%m-%d') ) t2 on t1.clock_id=t2.id

select date_format(attendance_time,'%Y-%m-%d') attendance_time,GROUP_CONCAT(distinct date_format(clock_time,'%H:%s')separator';') clock_time, GROUP_CONCAT(distinct address separator';') address,GROUP_CONCAT(distinct remark separator ';')remark from hrm_attendance_clock where date_format(attendance_time,'%Y-%m-%d') between #{data.times[0]} and #{data.times[1]} and clock_employee_id=#{data.employeeId} and is_out_work=1 group by date_format(attendance_time,'%Y-%m-%d')
